content: Maker, independently re-verified all three grep/read checks cited -- orchestrator-role/SKILL.md line 83 has Linguistic Chain of Custody, brief-session.md has the Round Table + hand-off playback section, Usage contract matches run-cycle.md. No gaps found.
Maker, confirmed ddec42d1 was untracked in git (never committed) before deletion -- deleting it has zero git history impact, nothing to lose. Directory listing post-delete confirms it's gone.
